text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks pass after the autumn Tenno Sho,
marking a year since King Halo declared her
intention to walk her own path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still just as arrogant and preoccupied with
being first-rate and commanding attention. That
being the case, we decide her next goal should be
the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, she talks about her mother's
desire to design signature racewear for future
URA Decorated Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She could become a Decorated Umamusume
herself, but why end her career? King Halo
emphasizes her desire to continue racing for as
long as she breathes.
